case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. FRANCISCO MORENO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-05-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, FRANCISCO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.50, DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MORENO NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.50) SERVED NOV-06-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, FRANCISCO
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-05-2009 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
